• Transit-Mapstars310 - Web app that animates vehicles (markers) on a map using the public transport timetables to interpolate their positions along the routes (polylines).

• KV6,15,17, and ARNU to GTFS-realtimestars1 - Java-based tool to process incoming KV6,15,17 and ARNU and match them to static transit data present in a RID integration database. It then proceeds to export this data as ARNU RITinfo, GTFS(realtime) and KV78turbo
• Civic Transitstars3 - Screen-scrapes KCATA’s TransitMaster WebWatch installation to produce a GTFS-realtime feed.
• sysstat - Performance monitoring tools for Linux.
• atoptool - Logging of system and process activity for long-term analysis, highlighting overloaded system.
• perf - Linux profiling with performance counters.
• OneBusAway GTFS Modules - A Java-based library for reading, writing, and transforming public transit data in the GTFS format, including database support.
• Chouette - Converts French-Transmodel, SIRI, NETeX. See Chouette.mobi website for more info.
• GTFS-realtime Exporter - A Java-based tool that assists in producing and sharing a GTFS-relatime feed.
• GTFS-realtime Alerts Producer Demo - A Java-based demo project for producing GTFS-realtime Service Alerts.
• GTFS-realtime Alerts Producer Web Applicationstars1 - A Java-based web application for producing GTFS-realtime Service Alerts.
• GTFS-realtime TripUpdates & VehiclePositions Producer Demo - A Java-based demo project for producing GTFS-realtime TripUpdates (estimated arrivals) and Vehicle Positions.
• GTFS-realtime Vehicle Positions Consumer/Visualizer Demo - A Java-based demo project for consuming a GTFS-realtime Vehicle Positions feed and displaying this info on a map.
• SIRI to GTFS-realtime - A Java-based command-line utility to convert from the SIRI format to GTFS-realtime

• WMATA BusPositions API to GTFS-realtimestars11 - Java-based tool to convert from WMATA's BusPositions API and Alert RSS feeds from MetroAlerts to GTFS-realtime TripUpdates, VehiclePositions, and Alerts feeds.
• SEPTA API to GTFS-realtimestars2 - Java-based tool to convert SEPTA's real-time bus and rail data to GTFS-realtime
• CTA API to GTFS-realtimestars5 - Java-based tool to convert CTA's Train Tracker data to GTFS-realtime.
• Detroit DOT to GTFS-realtimestars2 - Extract real-time info from DDOT's TransitMaster installation (database) and convert to GTFS-realtime
• Live Transit Event Triggerstars4 - Extracts data from Ride On's OrbCAD database and export as GTFS-realtime.
• SoundTransit to GTFS-realtimestars3 - Convert text file feed from Sound Transit to GTFS-realtime
• GTFS-realtime Munin Pluginstars1 - Provides a Munin plugin for logging information about a GTFS-realtime feed.
• SIRI API - Java classes generated from the v1.0 and v1.3 SIRI schemas.
• SIRI to GTFS-realtime - A Java-based command-line utility to convert from the SIRI format to GTFS-realtime.
